entity.label: Paruah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Flourishing, the father of Jehoshaphat, appointed to provide monthly supplies for Solomon from the tribe of Issachar (1 Kings 4:17).

verses.text: Jehoshaphat the son of Paruah, in Issachar:
